zh.lifeSummary: William Ryther是William Ryther和unknown unkown的兒子，於1252年1月28日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾盧黑。他於1280年之前與Lucia De Ross在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1309年8月之後，埋葬在英國越可爾盧黑。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Ryther是William Ryther和unknown unkown的儿子，于1252年1月28日出生在英国英格兰越可爾盧黑。他于1280年之前与Lucia De Ross在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1309年8月之后，埋葬在英国越可爾盧黑。

nameMeanings.name: Ryther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Reither, a variant of Reiter .

variants.name: Reiter
meanings: occupational name for a mounted soldier or knight, from Middle Low German rider, Middle High German rīter ‘rider’. It is also found in some central European countries, e.g. in Czechia and Slovenia. Compare Raiter .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: William Ryther was born on 28 January 1252, in Ryther, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Ryther and unknown unkown. He married Lucia De Ross before 1280, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died after August 1309, and was buried in Ryther, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Ryther est né le 28 janvier 1252, à Ryther, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Ryther et unknown unkown. Il a épousé Lucia De Ross avant 1280, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé après août 1309, et a été enterré à Ryther, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Ryther wurde am 28. Januar 1252 in Ryther, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William Ryther und unknown unkown geboren. Er hat vor 1280 in Yorkshire, England Lucia De Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb nach August 1309 und wurde in Ryther, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Ryther è nato il il 28 gennaio 1252 nel Ryther, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William Ryther e unknown unkown. Lui sposato Lucia De Ross prima del 1280, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il agosto 1309, e fu sepolto a Ryther, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Rytherは1252年1月28日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリスエルでWilliam Rytherとunknown unkownの息子として生まれた。1280年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでLucia De Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1309年8月以後に死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ryther(은)는 1252년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리터에서 William Ryther(와)과 unknown unkown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1280년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Lucia De Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1309년 8월 이후 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Ryther nasceu em 28 de janeiro de 1252, em Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William Ryther e unknown unkown. Ele casou-se com Lucia De Ross antes 1280, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu após agosto de 1309, e foi sepultado em Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Ryther родился 28 января 1252 г. в местности ритир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William Ryther и unknown unkown. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia De Ross перед 1280 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер после августа 1309 г. и был похоронен в местности ритир, еркшир, Англия.

es.28 January 1252–Aft August 1309: 28 de enero de 1252–después de agosto de 1309
es.lifeSummary: William Ryther nació el 28 de enero de 1252, en Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William Ryther y unknown unkown. Se casó con Lucia De Ross antes de 1280, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de agosto de 1309, y fue sepultado en Ryther, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
